ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the candidate */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate won */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "margin_of_victory" REAL /* Margin of victory for the winning candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "candidate_address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_information" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_information_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_information_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_information_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
